about_us.title: About Us
about_us.description_one: At Adz10x.com we're redefining how residential societies generate value from their digital presence. Our goal is simple yet powerful - to empower gated communities to monetize their visibility by connecting them with top brands for targeted, non-intrusive advertising opportunities.
about_us.description_two: We believe societies deserve more than just maintenance collections - they deserve a share in the digital economy. By facilitating verified ad campaigns within residential ecosystems, we are creating a new income stream for societies while offering brands authentic, hyperlocal visibility.

offering.title: Our Offerings
offering.sub_heading: Unlock high-impact marketing opportunities through hyper-targeted campaigns powered by WhatsApp group.

offering_content.heading: Lead Generation Campaigns
offering_content.description: Capture high-intent leads by targeting the right audience and engaging them with compelling CTAs that drive action.

offering_content.heading: Branding Campaigns
offering_content.description: Amplify your brand visibility and credibility through consistent, localized messaging. Perfect for product launches awareness drives, and reputation building.

offering_content.heading: Surveys
offering_content.description: Gain deep insights into customer preferences and behaviour with short, high-response surveys—ideal for product feedback, market research, and sentiment analysis.

offering_content.heading: Hyperlocal Promotions
offering_content.description: Reach residents in gated societies, townships, and local clusters with tailored offers and location-specific campaigns that resonate.

offering_content.heading: WhatsApp-First Engagements
offering_content.description: From announcements to click-to-chat CTAs, our campaigns are built for high engagement on WhatsApp—where your customers already are.

faqData.title: What is ADZ10X and how does it work?
faqData.content: ADZ10X enables societies to generate income by running digital brand campaigns through their community WhatsApp groups.

faqData.title: How do societies earn from this platform?
faqData.content: Societies earn each time a campaign is approved, shared, and reported, as per the agreed revenue share.

faqData.title: Is this service free for societies?
faqData.content: Yes, there are no charges — societies earn, we handle the rest.

faqData.title: Can societies control what ads are shown?
faqData.content: Absolutely. Every campaign requires approval from the society admin before going live.

faqData.title: What kind of brands advertise on ADZ10X?
faqData.content: Only verified and quality brands across sectors like healthcare, FMCG, real estate,education, and more.

faqData.title: How quickly can a campaign go live?
faqData.content: Campaigns can go live within 24–72 hours after approvals and funding confirmation.

faqData.title: Is resident data shared or used?
faqData.content: Never. We do not collect or share any resident data — full privacy is maintained.

faqData.title: What is the minimum payout amount?
faqData.content: Earnings can be withdrawn directly to society accounts with no minimum limit.

faqData.title: Can companies choose specific societies to target?
faqData.content: Yes, brands can select societies based on city , Area, for the campaigns.

faqData.title: What support is available for onboarding or issues?
faqData.content: Our dedicated support and relationship managers are always ready to help via email or phone.
